title: grok-config.yaml
description: Official JSON Schema for grok-config.yaml — centralizes all Grok model settings, context injection, privacy controls, and keyboard shortcuts. Compatible with grok-install.yaml@1.0+ and grok@2026.4+.

version.description: Semantic version of this configuration file.

author.description: X handle of the file owner, prefixed with '@'.

compatibility.description: Platform specs this file is tested and compatible with.

items.description: Spec identifier with minimum version suffix, e.g. 'grok-install.yaml@1.0+'.

grok.description: Global Grok model behavior settings applied to every interaction unless overridden per-prompt.

default_model.description: Grok model identifier to use for all requests unless overridden.

temperature.description: Sampling temperature controlling output randomness. 0 = fully deterministic, 2 = highly creative.

max_tokens.description: Hard cap on tokens per response. Must not exceed the model's context limit (131072 for grok-4).

response_language.description: BCP-47 language tag for response language (e.g. 'en', 'fr', 'de', 'es', 'zh-CN').

personality.description: Named personality preset shaping Grok's tone and verbosity across all responses.

reasoning_depth.description: Depth of internal reasoning before producing output. Higher depth improves quality but increases latency.

stream_responses.description: Stream tokens to the UI as they are generated rather than waiting for the full response.

fallback_model.description: Model to fall back to if the primary model is unavailable or rate-limited.

context.description: Static context automatically prepended to every Grok conversation to anchor situational awareness.

company.description: Project or organisation name injected for situational awareness.

audience.description: Who will read the responses (e.g. 'X power users & developers').

tone.description: Prose style guidance applied to all responses (e.g. 'clear, witty, actionable').

key_constraints.description: Hard rules Grok must respect in every single response.

domain_knowledge.description: File paths or URLs to inject as background knowledge into every conversation.

privacy.description: Data-handling, retention, and telemetry controls. Defaults to the most restrictive setting when omitted.

allow_telemetry.description: Allow xAI to collect usage telemetry to improve the product. Defaults to false.

share_anonymous_usage.description: Share anonymised aggregate usage statistics with the open-source community. Defaults to false.

never_share.description: Categories of data that must never leave the local environment, even in context.

data_retention_days.description: Number of days Grok retains conversation history. 0 means no retention.

redact_patterns.description: Regular-expression patterns whose matches are redacted from prompts before sending to xAI.

shortcuts.description: Trigger keyword → expansion prompt map. Invoke with '@grok <keyword>' in any issue, PR, or thread.
